Article.ArticleTitle: Effects of intranasal oxytocin combined with resistance training on testosterone, cortisol, fatigue, and skin temperature in paralympic powerlifting athletes.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: The authors declare no conflict of interest. Informed consent: Any informed consent was obtained from all subjects involved in the study.
